overall.description: First-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through a stormy night. The scene features operational navigation monitors displaying radar and GPS maps while lightning periodically illuminates the ocean ahead. This is game engine footage from a maritime simulation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge, moving from a state of oppressive darkness into moments of stark, electric illumination. It begins inside the bridge, where the only light comes from the artificial glow of the navigation monitor array as the ship pushes through a pitch-black storm. As the vessel advances, a brief flash of distant lightning on the right momentarily reveals the churning ocean waves before the environment plunges back into darkness. The scene then shifts as a powerful lightning strike directly ahead floods the view with light, exposing the ship's bow and the severity of the rough waters. Finally, the brilliance fades, returning the camera to the dim interior dominated by the green and blue light of the radar and GPS displays.
